notes: BudgetVault launch build with privacy-first branding and polished public-facing copy.
New slogan set and clearer trust messaging across the splash screen, guide, security hub, and install flow.
GitHub-ready package updated so you can upload straight to a repo and publish with GitHub Pages.
Version metadata and release notes stay wired for in-app update prompts and What's new screens.
Service worker update flow and deployment files kept ready for end-user releases.
githubPagesHint: If you host BudgetVault on GitHub Pages, updating this file in the deployed site is enough for the app to show release notes and prompt for refresh when a new build is available.
changelog: Applied the approved BudgetVault logo across the app, install icons, and launch surfaces.
